mapper.sql: id, name, description, template_site_id, industry, keyword_list::text as keyword_list, domain_pattern, config_overrides::text as config_overrides, total_count, built_count, live_count, status, creator_id, dept_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_matrix_groups WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_matrix_groups ( name, description, template_site_id, industry, keyword_list, domain_pattern, config_overrides, total_count, built_count, live_count, status, creator_id, dept_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{description}, #{templateSiteId}, #{industry}, #{keywordList}::jsonb, #{domainPattern}, #{configOverrides}::jsonb, #{totalCount}, #{builtCount}, #{liveCount}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{deptId}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_matrix_groups SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_matrix_groups SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id IN #{id}
